title: smilax glyciphylla
intro: Smilax glyciphylla, also known as Sweet Pittosporum, is a plant native to eastern Australia and New South Wales. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Smilax glyciphylla include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
